Counter-Strike has completely failed to adjust item prices to keep up with inflation. A kevlar vest might have cost $650 in November of 1999, but the US Consumer Price Index was only 168.3 back then. March, 2023's 301.8 CPI print means that Kevlar should now cost $1165.60! 2700 for an AK47? IN THIS ECONOMY? That'll be $4,841.71.
